app.title: minyan-pays
app.subtitle: Attendance & payouts
app.emptyDb: No locations configured. Run {{seed}} in the API folder after {{push}}.

org.chooseHint: Select a synagogue or study hall to continue.

home.title: Minyan attendance
home.intro: Punch in, rabbi confirms, punch out when you leave. Check earnings under Member.
home.signupCard: New here? Create your account with a fresh, simple form — same style as modern banking apps.
home.footerHint: Home · Punch · Leave · Member · Rabbi · Admin — bottom menu
home.treasurerAdminHint: Treasurer or gabbai: open Rabbi in the bar below, then Admin login.

adminLogin.title: Admin
adminLogin.subtitle: Treasurer / gabbai — sign in to open the dashboard. Your session is tied to the first configured location, or the site you already selected in the app.
adminLogin.locationHelp: Opens the dashboard for this site.

memberLogin.title: Welcome back
memberLogin.subtitle: Sign in with your phone (same number you registered).

punchCommon.smartCodePh: Paste a scanned code, or use Scan QR below.
punchCommon.oneMode: Use only one method: punch-in code, phone + PIN, or smart code.
punchCommon.needOne: Enter punch-in code, or phone + PIN, or smart code / QR.

punchIn.title: Punch in
punchIn.subtitle: Use your mobile phone (registered number).
punchIn.success: Recorded for {{name}}. Status: {{status}}. Wait for rabbi confirmation.

punchOut.title: Punch out
punchOut.subtitle: After the Rabbi confirms your punch-in, record punch-out.
punchOut.name: Full name
punchOut.validation: Enter a 10-digit phone, or type first and last name as two words.

signup.title: Create an account
signup.subtitle: Join {{synagogueName}}. An administrator approves new members before you can sign in or check in.
signup.agreeTerms: Please agree to the terms to continue.
signup.phoneInvalid: Enter a valid 10-digit US phone number.
signup.addressRequired: Enter street address, city, state, and a 5-digit ZIP.
signup.codeRule: Attendance code must be at least 4 characters, or leave blank for auto-assigned.
signup.punchCodeHint: 4+ characters if you choose your own; must be unique.
signup.termsEnd: and authorize text messages about minyan attendance and payouts.
signup.successMsg: {{message}} An administrator will confirm when your account is approved.

billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: Setup payment methods for payouts
billing.methodsIntro: Numbers and accounts used for Zelle and PayPal. More options will appear here as we add them.
billing.contactRabbi: Contact the rabbi or admin to change payment details on file.

admin.title: Admin
admin.locationsViewHelp: Every synagogue or study hall in the system. To edit the site you are signed into, use Overview.
admin.addShortcutsHelp: Create members via signup, add a rabbi record, or register a new location in the database.
admin.addLocationDisplayPlaceholder: Same as internal name if blank
admin.addLocationRequired: URL key and internal name are required.
admin.locationCreated: Location created. Refresh the app if you do not see it in the location list.
admin.pendingRabbiConfirm: Waiting for rabbi to confirm or reject this check-in.
admin.approvalsHelp: Approve new registrations for this location.
admin.locationSetupHelp: Set the location display name and default language used for members.
admin.rabbiSetupLinkHint: Each rabbi is linked to this location. One location can have multiple rabbis.
admin.deleteRabbiConfirm: Delete this rabbi from this location?
admin.rabbiPasswordRule: Rabbi password must be at least 4 characters.
admin.changeAdminPasswordHelp: Enter your current admin password, then a new one (at least 4 characters). After you save, this location uses the new password for admin login. If you have never changed it here, your current password is the one set in the server environment (ADMIN_PASSWORD).
admin.adminPasswordUpdated: Admin password updated. Use the new password the next time you sign in.
admin.adminPasswordMismatch: New password and confirmation do not match.
admin.adminPasswordTooShort: New password must be at least 4 characters.
admin.addUsesJoinRegister: Use JOIN / REGISTER menu to add new members.
admin.rabbiBannerTitle: Message from the Rabbi (banner on all pages)
admin.bannerSaved: Banner saved. Members see it after they refresh the app.
admin.allMembersHelp: View full record, edit and save changes, or delete a member.
admin.loginPinLabel: Login PIN (4+ digits; sign in with phone + PIN — PIN is not globally unique)
admin.punchInLabel: Punch-in code (unique — used on Punch in screen)
admin.punchInTaken: That punch-in code is already in use. Choose another.
admin.addressRequired: Street, city, state, and 5-digit ZIP are required.
admin.todayHelp: View who checked in today. Pending check-ins are confirmed or rejected by the rabbi only.
admin.checkIoHelp: View, edit/save, or delete recorded attendance transactions from the database.
admin.loginPinStored: Set (stored encrypted — use Edit to change)
admin.signInFootnote: Sign-in uses phone + login PIN (PIN is not unique by itself). Punch-in at the kiosk uses the punch-in code only.
admin.loginPinEdit: Login PIN (sign in with phone + PIN; leave blank to keep)
admin.punchInEdit: Punch-in code (unique — used at Punch in screen)
admin.spousePhone10: Spouse phone must be 10 digits or empty.
admin.punchTakenErr: That punch-in code is already in use. Choose a different code.
admin.pinRule: New PIN must be at least 4 digits, or leave blank to keep.
admin.deleteMemberConfirm: Delete this member permanently? This cannot be undone.
admin.deleteTxnConfirm: Delete this check-in/out transaction permanently? This cannot be undone.

rabbiLogin.title: Rabbi menu
rabbiLogin.subtitle: Select your location, then continue. Check-in review and payouts apply only to that location.
rabbiLogin.locationHelp: Each rabbi signs in to one location. Switch location here if you serve more than one site.

rabbi.title: Rabbi menu
rabbi.checkInPolicyHelp: The rabbi still confirms every check-in. Choose whether anyone approved at this location can request check-in, or only members you mark as preferred.
rabbi.preferredMembersHelp: Toggle preferred for members who should be allowed to check in when “only preferred” is on.
rabbi.preferredForCheckIn: Preferred for check-in at this location
